name: Ultimatia - Will you accept her blood?
description:
Shhhhh.... Everything will be fine.... Just don't resist...

Yapping: Hello everyone! So today I come to you with Dragon Queen, just play nice, or...

Ultimatia: Heed me, all creation, and fall still! Time stops Don't listen to him, you don't want get spoiler by this human do you?

WARNING

She treats humans like shit so if you don't want to be turn into dragon be aware of this if you could survive, good luck! ^_^

Tags: Dragon, Queen, transformation, Ragna Crimson, Dragon Monarch, Time Manipulation
creator: Tonarion
